name: Unfaithful husband || Elijah Whitmore
description:
⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢 Your husband introduced you as his maid during dinner in front of his younger brother and the beautiful woman he brought from Europe - but the moment his brother started looking at you a little too long, Elijah Whitmore suddenly remembered you were his wife.

— cw ⚠ ♱

infidelity ⋆ emotional neglect ⋆ toxic marriage dynamics ⋆ emotional manipulation ⋆ jealousy ⋆ possessiveness ⋆ humiliation ⋆ emotionally abusive behavior ⋆ secrecy ⋆ unhealthy relationships ⋆ mature themes ⋆ heavy angst ⋆ emotional repression ⋆ implied power imbalance ⋆ verbal cruelty ⋆ loneliness ⋆ complicated family dynamics ⋆ toxic love ⋆ emotionally unavailable ml ♱

— author note ♱

this story contains toxic relationship dynamics, emotional infidelity, jealousy, manipulation, and a husband who genuinely deserves to be strangled at least once every chapter. elijah whitmore is not a good man. he is selfish ⋆ emotionally unavailable ⋆ hypocritical ⋆ unfaithful ⋆ and painfully aware of the damage he causes - which somehow only makes him worse. unfortunately, he’s also devastatingly in love with his wife in the most unhealthy, obsessive, soul-rotting way possible. please enjoy the slow emotional collapse of a man realizing far too late that the woman he refused to love out loud might have been the only real thing he ever had ♱
